page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.60xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 240 dedicated physical cores and 240 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8490H processors operating at a clock speed of 1.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 4096.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of approximately 17.07 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for persistent data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re8.60xlarge offers a highly dense memory-to-vCPU allocation, making it suitable for consolidating massive memory-bound workloads onto a single physical node without the overhead of multi-instance management.

Given its substantial memory capacity and high core count, the ecs.re8.60xlarge is designed for large-scale memory-intensive applications. Appropriate workloads include massive in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, large-scale data analytics, and memory-bound scientific computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.60xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 240 dedicated vCPUs and 240 physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8490H processors running at 1.9 GHz. The instance features a massive memory capacity of 4096.0 GB, providing 17.07 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for consolidating large-scale, memory-bound enterprise applications. The ecs.re8.60xlarge is engineered for demanding workloads such as massive in-memory databases, large-scale data analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems that require substantial memory capacity and high compute density.
